Nasdaq 24/7 Trading Push | NO | MED confidence**  
Trending markets feature "Nasdaq round-the-clock trading by June 30?" at 13% YES with $43.8K volume, positioning it as a hot topic for mispriced opportunities among Polymarket users discussing tech/finance shifts on X[2]. Low odds imply skepticism, potentially attracting contrarian bets.

Elon Musk Tweet Volumes Dominating Pop Culture | NO | HIGH confidence**
